_meta.keyKnowledge: We generate, test, iterate and communicate our design ideas using technical terms and graphics, both by hand and digitally.

_source.w: We generate, test, iterate and communicate our design ideas using technical terms and graphics, both by hand and digitally.
y: The iterative design process — generate, test, refine — is how professional designers create effective solutions.
Technical communication ensures our ideas can be understood, evaluated and manufactured.
Testing and iterating transforms promising ideas into proven solutions.
eg: We generate multiple design concepts and evaluate them against our design criteria.
We create prototypes and test them, using the results to refine our designs.
We produce technical drawings with proper conventions — dimensions, materials lists, assembly views.
We use CAD software to develop detailed digital models of our designs.
We present our design process showing how ideas evolved through iteration.
We communicate design decisions using appropriate technical terminology.
